data.title: BNB Chain: The latest list of winners of BNB Hack is announced, with a total of 5 projects winning
B² Network announced that it will use the IDO funds and May transaction fees to purchase B2 in the open market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News B² Network announced that it will use all BNB raised from IDO and all fees generated by the platform during May 2025 to purchase B2 tokens on the open market. The plan will be carried out in two phases:
Phase 1: 50% will be completed in mid-June before the BUZZ airdrop
Phase 2: The remaining 50% will continue after the BUZZ airdrop
This open market purchase is intended to give back to the community for long-term support and reflects B² Network's firm commitment to sustainable development.

data.title: Binance Wallet Exclusive TGE to List SGC on June 13
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance Wallet will launch the SGC exclusive TGE from 4:00 to 6:00 pm (UTC+8) on June 13, 2025. Subscription qualifications: Eligible users must use Binance Alpha points to participate; 
An additional 300,000,000 SGC will be used for future activities, and specific details will be announced separately.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Traders Expect Quiet—But On-Chain Data Suggests Chaos
data.description:
The Bitcoin Options traders have been pricing in low implied volatility, but on-chain data shows a setup ripe for amplified price swings. Bitcoin Options ATM IV Has Been Trending Lower In its latest weekly report, the analytics firm Glassnode has talked about how the volatility risk associated with Bitcoin looks from the perspective of on-chain analysis. Related Reading: Ethereum To $3,400? On-Chain Shows No Big Hurdles Ahead The indicator shared by Glassnode is the Realized Supply Density, which tells us about how concentrated the cryptocurrency’s supply is around the current spot price. When the value of this metric is high, it means the investors have participated in a large amount of buying at or near the asset’s latest price
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-options-traders-expect-on-chain-chaos/

data.title: Paul Tudor Jones Advocates Bitcoin, Gold, and Stocks as Inflation Hedge
data.description: According to Foresight News, billionaire investor Paul Tudor Jones recently stated that Bitcoin, gold, and stocks represent the optimal investment portfolio to combat inflation. His remarks highlight the growing interest in diverse asset classes as a strategy to preserve wealth amid economic uncertainties.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Stablecoin market value hits record high of $228 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CryptoQuant data, the stablecoin market is growing again, with a market value of $228 billion in 2025, a record high, an increase of $33 billion from the previous level, a 17% increase. This growth is mainly driven by increased trading activities, expanded payment uses, and clearer U.S. regulation under the Trump administration.

data.title: Institutional Bitcoin holdings surge to 31%: Gemini and Glassnode study reveals shift in ownership
data.description:
12-6-2025 – A study from Gemini and Glassnode unveils a profound evolution in Bitcoin’s ownership dynamics, underscoring the cryptocurrency’s ascent into a cornerstone of institutional finance. The findings reveal that centralised entities—spanning governments, exchange-traded funds (ETFs), public corporations, and digital exchanges—now command nearly 31% of Bitcoin’s circulating supply, equating to over 6. 1 million BTC, with [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/institutional-bitcoin-holdings-surge-to-31-gemini-and-glassnode-study-reveals-shift-in-ownership/

data.title: Trump to enact key parts of US-UK trade deal within days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump is ready to sign a key part of the US-UK trade agreement, which will reduce tariffs on British cars exported to the United States in exchange for American beef and ethanol producers' access to the British market. On May 8, Trump and Starmer signed the five-page "Economic Prosperity Agreement" at a televised press conference in the Oval Office, and the "Cars for Agriculture" agreement was signed more than a month later. British officials familiar with the negotiations said the two sides are still negotiating the part of the agreement that Starmer said would give British steel manufacturers zero tariff access to the United States. (Financial Times)

data.title: Former Bank of Japan member Takako Masai: Trump's tariffs have halted the Bank of Japan's rate hike cycle
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Former Bank of Japan board member Takako Masai said on Thursday that U.S. President Trump's tariffs may have ended the Bank of Japan's interest rate hike cycle, and the possibility of further rate hikes is rapidly declining as exports are expected to be hit. Masai, who maintains close contact with current policymakers, said that uncertainty in U.S. trade policy is causing huge disruptions to the global economy, which may hit Japan's exports, output, wage growth and consumption. U.S. auto tariffs are particularly devastating because the auto industry plays a huge role in Japan's economy. She said, "The real test for the Japanese economy may come in 2026" because the impact of U.S. tariffs will begin to appear in 6 to 12 months. "The Bank of Japan may not be able to raise interest rates for quite some time," she said. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto exchange Gate continues to upgrade and move towards becoming a long-term leading exchange
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Decrypt, Gate, a long-established exchange that has been established for more than 12 years, is accelerating its move towards the "next generation super unicorn" of Web3 through brand renewal, technology upgrades and global compliance layout.
The report pointed out that Gate currently has more than 26 million global users, supports more than 3,800 currencies, and its total trading volume ranks among the top three exchanges. The media called it "a rare long-distance runner in the crypto industry" and emphasized that Gate has demonstrated its strategic determination and robust resilience across cycles with its 128.57% reserve rate, the deflationary destruction mechanism of the platform currency GT, and its active layout in global compliance licenses. Gate's recent upgrades also include the use of a new domain name Gate.com and a minimalist logo, marking the dual evolution of brand image and user experience.
Gate founder Dr. Han said: "A truly long-term leading exchange should be able to serve billions of users, support millions of tokens, execute billions of transactions, and host trillions of funds, and fully adapt to global compliance supervision, and Gate is firmly moving towards this goal.

data.title: Ministry of Foreign Affairs: We hope that the United States will work with China to implement the important consensus reached during the call between the two heads of state and give full play to the role of the China-US economic and trade consultation mechanism
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Lin Jian hosted a regular press conference. A foreign media reporter asked that the US President posted on "Real Social" yesterday that an agreement had been reached with China, for example, China would provide rare earth magnets, etc. Can China confirm these details? 
Lin Jian responded that yesterday afternoon China had released news about the first meeting of the China-US economic and trade consultation mechanism, which you can check. I want to emphasize that this meeting was held under the strategic guidance of the two heads of state. The two sides reached a principled consensus on the framework of measures to implement the important consensus reached by the two heads of state on June 5 and consolidate the results of the Geneva economic and trade talks, and made new progress in resolving the economic and trade concerns of both sides. 
Lin Jian said that China has always kept its promises and achieved results. Since a consensus has been reached, both sides should abide by it. It is hoped that the US will work with China to implement the important consensus reached by the two heads of state in the call, give play to the role of the China-US economic and trade consultation mechanism, and enhance consensus, reduce misunderstandings and strengthen cooperation through communication and dialogue.
